rule: .ͼ1 .cm-highlightSpace { background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 55%, rgb(170, 170, 170) 20%, transparent 5%); background-position: center center; }
.ͼ2 .cm-button:active { background-image: linear-gradient(rgb(180, 180, 180), rgb(208, 211, 214)); }
.ͼ2 .cm-button { background-image: linear-gradient(rgb(239, 241, 245), rgb(217, 217, 223)); border: 1px solid rgb(136, 136, 136); }
.ͼ3 .cm-button:active { background-image: linear-gradient(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(51, 51, 51)); }
.ͼ3 .cm-button { background-image: linear-gradient(rgb(57, 57, 57), rgb(17, 17, 17)); border: 1px solid rgb(136, 136, 136); }

.react-flow.dark { --xy-edge-stroke-default: #3e3e3e; --xy-edge-stroke-width-default: 1; --xy-edge-stroke-selected-default: #727272; --xy-connectionline-stroke-default: #b1b1b7; --xy-connectionline-stroke-width-default: 1; --xy-attribution-background-color-default: #96969640; --xy-minimap-background-color-default: #141414; --xy-minimap-mask-background-color-default: #3c3c3c99; --xy-minimap-mask-stroke-color-default: transparent; --xy-minimap-mask-stroke-width-default: 1; --xy-minimap-node-background-color-default: #2b2b2b; --xy-minimap-node-stroke-color-default: transparent; --xy-minimap-node-stroke-width-default: 2; --xy-background-color-default: #141414; --xy-background-pattern-dots-color-default: #777; --xy-background-pattern-lines-color-default: #777; --xy-background-pattern-cross-color-default: #777; --xy-node-color-default: #f8f8f8; --xy-node-border-default: 1px solid #3c3c3c; --xy-node-background-color-default: #1e1e1e; --xy-node-group-background-color-default: #f0f0f040; --xy-n
.react-flow__controls { box-shadow: var(--xy-controls-box-shadow,var(--xy-controls-box-shadow-default)); flex-direction: column; display: flex; }

.react-flow__node-input.selectable:hover, .react-flow__node-default.selectable:hover, .react-flow__node-output.selectable:hover, .react-flow__node-group.selectable:hover { box-shadow: var(--xy-node-boxshadow-hover,var(--xy-node-boxshadow-hover-default)); }

.react-flow__node-input.selectable.selected, .react-flow__node-input.selectable:focus, .react-flow__node-default.selectable.selected, .react-flow__node-default.selectable:focus, .react-flow__node-output.selectable.selected, .react-flow__node-output.selectable:focus, .react-flow__node-group.selectable.selected, .react-flow__node-group.selectable:focus { box-shadow: var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected,var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected-default)); }
.react-flow__node-input.selectable:focus-visible { box-shadow: var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected,var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected-default)); }
.react-flow__node-default.selectable:focus-visible { box-shadow: var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected,var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected-default)); }
.react-flow__node-output.selectable:focus-visible { box-shadow: var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected,var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected-default)); }
.react-flow__node-group.selectable:focus-visible { box-shadow: var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected,var(--xy-node-boxshadow-selected-default)); }

.rune-graph-breadcrumbs { z-index: 5; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); max-width: calc(100% - 24px); color: var(--foreground,#e8e6e1); background: lab(2.38844 0.92943 -4.09593 / 0.82); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 999px; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 11px; display: inline-flex; position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 12px; box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.22) 0px 10px 24px; }
.rune-flow-node-shell--dimmed { opacity: 0.32; filter: saturate(0.72); }
.rune-flow-node-shell--related .rune-node { box-shadow: lab(100 0 0 / 0.0392157) 0px 0px 0px 1px, lab(0 0 0 / 0.32) 0px 8px 24px; }
.rune-flow-node-shell--focus .rune-node { box-shadow: lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.45) 0px 0px 0px 1px, lab(0 0 0 / 0.42) 0px 12px 28px; }

.rune-graph-group { border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary,#00d4aa) 14%, transparent); background: linear-gradient(lab(6.04091 1.53229 -6.89823 / 0.4), lab(2.94688 1.03831 -4.64806 / 0.16)), radial-gradient(circle at 0px 0px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.04), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 46%); border-radius: 18px; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; box-shadow: lab(100 0 0 / 0.0313726) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, lab(0 0 0 / 0.12) 0px 8px 22px; }

.rune-node { border-radius: var(--radius-lg,8px); font-family: var(--font-sans,"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: var(--text-base,13px); min-width: 200px; color: var(--color-node-text,#e8e6e1); background: lab(6.04091 1.53229 -6.89823); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.4) 0px 1px 4px; }
.rune-node:hover { box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.5) 0px 2px 12px; }

.rune-edge-label { font-size: var(--text-xs,11px); background: var(--color-edge-label-bg,#181824); padding: var(--space-1,1px) var(--space-2,4px); border-radius: var(--radius-sm,3px); border: 1px solid var(--color-edge-label-border,#ffffff0f); color: var(--color-node-text,#e8e6e1); pointer-events: all; transition: border-color 0.14s, box-shadow 0.14s, background-color 0.14s; }

.rune-panel { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg,6px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg,0 2px 8px #00000014); padding: var(--space-6,12px); font-family: var(--font-sans,-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif); font-size: var(--text-base,13px); color: var(--foreground); }

.rune-node-search-match { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-warning,#ecc94b); }

.dv-context-menu { background: var(--dv-context-menu-background-color,var(--dv-activegroup-hiddenpanel-tab-background-color)); min-width: 160px; color: var(--dv-context-menu-color,var(--dv-activegroup-hiddenpanel-tab-color)); border: 1px solid var(--dv-tab-divider-color); border-radius: var(--dv-border-radius); box-shadow: var(--dv-floating-box-shadow); padding: 4px 0px; overflow: hidden; }

.dv-resize-container { --dv-overlay-z-index: var(--dv-overlay-z-index,999); z-index: calc(var(--dv-overlay-z-index) - 2); border: var(--dv-floating-border); box-shadow: var(--dv-floating-box-shadow); will-change: transform, opacity; backface-visibility: hidden; position: absolute; transform: translate(0px, 0px); }

@layer theme {
  :root, :host { --font-sans: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; --font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace; --color-red-500: #fb2c36; --color-amber-300: #ffd236; --color-amber-500: #f99c00; --color-green-300: #7bf1a8; --color-green-500: #00c758; --color-teal-300: #46ecd5; --color-teal-500: #00baa7; --color-blue-300: #90c5ff; --color-blue-500: #3080ff; --color-purple-300: #d9b3ff; --color-purple-500: #ac4bff; --color-rose-300: #ffa2ae; --color-rose-500: #ff2357; --color-slate-300: #cad5e2; --color-slate-500: #62748e; --color-gray-300: #d1d5dc; --color-gray-500: #6a7282; --color-black: #000; --color-white: #fff; --spacing: .25rem; --container-md: 28rem; --container-lg: 32rem; --text-xs: .75rem; --text-xs--line-height: calc(1 / .75); --text-sm: .875rem; --text-sm--line-height: calc(1.25 / .875); --text-base: 1rem; --text-base
@property --tw-enter-blur { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --tw-exit-blur { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }

:root { --color-surface-1: #fff; --color-surface-2: #f8fafc; --color-surface-3: #f1f5f9; --color-foreground-primary: #0f172a; --color-foreground-secondary: #475569; --color-foreground-muted: #94a3b8; --color-accent-base: #6366f1; --color-accent-hover: #4f46e5; --color-accent-subtle: #eef2ff; --color-danger-base: #dc2626; --color-danger-hover: #b91c1c; --color-warning-base: #d97706; --color-warning-hover: #b45309; --color-success-base: #16a34a; --color-success-hover: #15803d; --color-border-subtle: #e2e8f0; --color-border-default: #cbd5e1; --color-border-strong: #94a3b8; --font-family-sans: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; --font-family-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; --font-display: "Outfit", system-ui, sans-serif; --font-mono: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; --font-size-xs: .75rem; --font-size-sm: .875rem; --font-size-base: 1rem; --font-size-lg: 1.125rem; --font-size-xl: 1.25rem; --font-size-2xl: 1.5rem; --font-size-3xl: 1

[data-theme="daikonic"] .studio-brand__mark { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); background: linear-gradient(rgb(25, 68, 84) 0px, rgb(25, 68, 84) 18%, rgb(65, 184, 170) 18%, rgb(65, 184, 170) 42%, rgb(250, 153, 74) 42%, rgb(250, 153, 74) 66%, rgb(240, 54, 48) 66%, rgb(240, 54, 48) 100%); border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); position: relative; box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 0px 0px 0px 0.5px inset; }
[data-theme="daikonic"] [data-slot="button"][data-variant="default"] { box-shadow: 0 0 0 .5px var(--primary), 0 6px 18px -6px var(--primary); }

.studio-editor-page__source .cm-editor .cm-tooltip { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--input); color: var(--foreground); border-radius: var(--radius-md); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4) 0px 4px 12px; }
.studio-app .react-flow__controls { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); overflow: hidden; }
.studio-app .react-flow__minimap { background: var(--background); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }

[data-slot="enum-form"] input:focus, [data-slot="function-form"] input:focus, [data-slot="data-type-form"] input:focus, [data-slot="expression-editor"]:focus { border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--primary); }

.glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"], .glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"][data-variant="secondary"] { transition: 0.2s; box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.2) 0px 1px 2px; color: lab(70.9238 0.6603 -3.72039) !important; background: lab(100 0 0 / 0.04) !important; border: 1px solid lab(100 0 0 / 0.08) !important; }

.glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"]:hover, .glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"][data-variant="secondary"]:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.3) 0px 2px 8px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.08) 0px 0px 12px; color: lab(90.6442 0.653893 -3.72428) !important; background: lab(100 0 0 / 0.08) !important; border-color: lab(100 0 0 / 0.15) !important; }
.glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"]:active { transform: translateY(0px); box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.2) 0px 1px 2px; }

.glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"][data-variant="default"] { box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.2) 0px 1px 2px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.15) 0px 0px 8px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.06) 0px 0px 12px inset; color: lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421) !important; background: lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.12) !important; border-color: lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.35) !important; }

.glass-toolbar [data-slot="button"][data-variant="default"]:hover { box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.3) 0px 2px 8px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.25) 0px 0px 16px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.08) 0px 0px 16px inset; color: lab(84.5853 -51.8795 11.5526) !important; background: lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.18) !important; border-color: lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.5) !important; }

.glass-header [data-slot="button"] { transition: 0.2s; box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.2) 0px 1px 2px; color: lab(70.9238 0.6603 -3.72039) !important; background: lab(100 0 0 / 0.04) !important; border: 1px solid lab(100 0 0 / 0.08) !important; }

.glass-header [data-slot="button"]:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.3) 0px 2px 8px, lab(76.7242 -59.4924 13.1421 / 0.08) 0px 0px 10px; color: lab(90.6442 0.653893 -3.72428) !important; background: lab(100 0 0 / 0.08) !important; border-color: lab(100 0 0 / 0.15) !important; }

[data-slot="popover-content"] { box-shadow: lab(0 0 0 / 0.5) 0px 8px 32px, lab(100 0 0 / 0.1) 0px 0px 1px; background: lab(2.38844 0.92943 -4.09593 / 0.92) !important; border-color: lab(100 0 0 / 0.1) !important; }
.preview-panel { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--card), transparent 32%), var(--background); }
.preview-panel__editor { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--muted), transparent 18%), var(--background); }

.preview-panel__target-button { letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted-foreground); background: 0px 0px; border: 0px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; transition: background-color 0.16s, color 0.16s, box-shadow 0.16s; }
.preview-panel__target-button[data-state="active"] { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border); }
.preview-panel__select, .preview-panel__input { color: var(--foreground); box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 0px 1px inset; }
.preview-panel__body { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--muted), transparent 24%); }
.preview-panel__group, .preview-panel__array-item, .preview-panel__sample { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18) 0px 1px 2px; }

.refactory-grid-bg { background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.016) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.016) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px); background-size: 80px 80px; }
.studio-app .dockview-theme-abyss .dv-groupview { background: var(--card); box-shadow: 0 0 0 .5px var(--border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }

.studio-app .dockview-theme-abyss .dv-split-view-container.dv-horizontal > .dv-sash-container > .dv-sash::after { content: ""; background: var(--dv-sash-color); border-radius: 999px; width: 2px; transition: background-color 0.12s, box-shadow 0.12s, transform 0.12s; position: absolute; top: 16px; bottom: 16px; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); box-shadow: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22) 0px 0px 0px 1px; }

.studio-app .dockview-theme-abyss .dv-split-view-container.dv-vertical > .dv-sash-container > .dv-sash::after { content: ""; background: var(--dv-sash-color); border-radius: 999px; height: 2px; transition: background-color 0.12s, box-shadow 0.12s, transform 0.12s; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 16px; right: 16px; transform: translateY(-50%); box-shadow: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22) 0px 0px 0px 1px; }

.studio-app .dockview-theme-abyss .dv-split-view-container .dv-sash-container .dv-sash.dv-enabled:hover::after, .studio-app .dockview-theme-abyss .dv-split-view-container .dv-sash-container .dv-sash.dv-enabled:active::after { background: var(--dv-active-sash-color); box-shadow: rgba(94, 234, 212, 0.18) 0px 0px 0px 2px; }
@property --tw-gradient-position { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-gradient-from { syntax: "<color>"; inherits: false; initial-value: #0000; }
@property --tw-gradient-via { syntax: "<color>"; inherits: false; initial-value: #0000; }
@property --tw-gradient-to { syntax: "<color>"; inherits: false; initial-value: #0000; }
@property --tw-gradient-stops { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-gradient-via-stops { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-gradient-from-position { syntax: "<length-percentage>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0%; }
@property --tw-gradient-via-position { syntax: "<length-percentage>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 50%; }
@property --tw-gradient-to-position { syntax: "<length-percentage>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 100%; }
@property --tw-shadow { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0 0 #0000; }
@property --tw-shadow-color { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-shadow-alpha { syntax: "<percentage>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 100%; }
@property --tw-inset-shadow { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0 0 #0000; }
@property --tw-inset-shadow-color { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-inset-shadow-alpha { syntax: "<percentage>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 100%; }
@property --tw-ring-shadow { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0 0 #0000; }
@property --tw-inset-ring-shadow { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0 0 #0000; }
@property --tw-ring-offset-shadow { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0 0 #0000; }
@property --tw-blur { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-drop-shadow { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-drop-shadow-color { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-drop-shadow-alpha { syntax: "<percentage>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 100%; }
@property --tw-drop-shadow-size { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
@property --tw-backdrop-blur { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; }
